projects.name: zag
projects.description: One CLI for Claude, Codex, Gemini, Copilot, and Ollama — keep your workflows stable even as agents change weekly.

projects.name: zig
projects.description: Describe workflows, share them, run them. A workflow runtime written in Rust.

projects.name: zad
projects.description: Agent adapter system — hook one agent up to several service providers through a uniform interface.

projects.name: ztf
projects.description: End-to-end testing harness that uses `zag` verification to run complex flows against real agents.

projects.name: juris
projects.description: CLI that collects and normalises Swedish legal documents from official government sources.

projects.name: spotifai
projects.description: AI-augmented Spotify companion that uses LLMs to plan, curate, and explain listening sessions.

projects.name: cv
projects.description: Personal site and CV for Niclas Lindstedt built with Vite, React, and TypeScript.

projects.name: blog
projects.description: Markdown blog rendered through a terminal-themed React frontend; content is authored and maintained by Claude skills.
